pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation features.
Replace javax.inject with jakarta.inject-api to comply with Jakarta EE namespace requirements for modern JDKs.
Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to comply with Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
Upgrade SLF4J to version 2.x which is required for compatibility with modern logging implementations on Java 21.
Upgrade Logback to version 1.4.x to ensure compatibility with SLF4J 2.x and Java 21.
Upgrade JUnit to version 5.10.1 to ensure test compatibility with Java 21.
Upgrade Mockito to version 5.8.0 to ensure mocking capabilities work correctly on Java 21.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to version 3.2.5 to support running tests on Java 21.
Upgrade maven-failsafe-plugin to version 3.2.5 to support integration tests on Java 21.
Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to version 0.8.11 to support code coverage analysis for Java 21 bytecode.
Upgrade Jackson to version 2.16.1 to ensure JSON processing compatibility with Java 21.
Upgrade SnakeYAML to version 2.0 to ensure YAML parsing compatibility with Java 21.
Upgrade Google Auto Service to version 1.1.1 to ensure annotation processing compatibility with Java 21.
Upgrade JavaPoet to version 1.13.0 to ensure code generation compatibility with Java 21.
Upgrade maven-javadoc-plugin to version 3.6.3 to support generating documentation for Java 21 APIs.
